title: Trade Less
description:
This data pack stops all villagers from selling emeralds
Perfect for servers with a tight economy or a more challenging survival experience
body:
Tired of villagers handing out emeralds like candy? Trade Less puts an end to that! This lightweight data pack disables any villager trade that gives the player emeralds, while still letting you spend emeralds on all your favorite goodies.

✅ Keep buying from villagers.
❌ No more selling emeralds.
💼 Perfect for economy servers, hardcore worlds, or players who want a more balanced trading experience.
